abort.no_host: Could not determine the IP address.
abort.not_fritzbox: The discovered device is not a FritzBox.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to FritzBox. Please check the IP address and network connection.
error.config_entry_not_found: Config entry not found. Please add the integration again.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check username and password. If credentials are correct, enable TR-064 (Permit access for apps) in the FritzBox under Home Network > Network > Network settings > Access Settings in the Home Network. Note: UPnP is only needed for automatic discovery, not for API access.
error.invalid_host: Invalid host. Please enter a valid IP address or hostname.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the Home Assistant logs for details. Make sure TR-064 (Permit access for apps) is enabled in the FritzBox.

confirm.description: A FritzBox was automatically discovered: {host}. Please confirm the configuration.
confirm.title: Fritz!Box VPN Found

data_description.username: Username used to authenticate against the FritzBox

reauth_confirm.description: Authentication failed for {host}. Enter valid credentials.
reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Fritz!Box VPN

data.password: Password (leave empty to keep current password)

data_description.password: Password used to authenticate against the FritzBox
data_description.username: Username used to authenticate against the FritzBox

reconfigure.description: Update your FritzBox connection details. The password field is not displayed for security reasons. Leave it empty to keep the current password, or enter a new password to change it.
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Fritz!Box VPN

data_description.password: Password used to authenticate against the FritzBox
data_description.username: Username used to authenticate against the FritzBox

user.description: Please enter your FritzBox connection details. If a FritzBox integration is already configured, the data will be automatically used.
user.title: Fritz!Box VPN Configuration

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to FritzBox. Please check the IP address and network connection.
error.config_entry_not_found: Config entry not found. Please add the integration again.
error.coordinator_not_ready: Data is still loading. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.integration_not_loaded: Integration is not loaded. Please start the integration first.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check username and password.
error.invalid_host: Invalid host. Please enter a valid IP address or hostname.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the Home Assistant logs.

data_description.confirm: Check to confirm removal and reload

cleanup_confirm.description: Entities that refer to VPN connections no longer present on the Fritz!Box will be removed from the entity registry. Check the box below and submit to remove them and reload the integration.
cleanup_confirm.title: Remove unavailable entities

data.password: Password (leave empty to keep current password)

data_description.password: Password used to authenticate against the FritzBox
data_description.username: Username used to authenticate against the FritzBox

configure.description: Update your FritzBox connection details. The password field is not displayed for security reasons. Leave it empty to keep the current password, or enter a new password to change it.
configure.title: Configure Fritz!Box VPN

data.confirm: Repair entity IDs and reload integration

data_description.confirm: Check to confirm repairing entity IDs and reload

repair_entity_ids_confirm.description: Entity IDs that got a _2, _3, _4 suffix (e.g. after faulty deactivation) will be renamed back to the base ID. The stale base entry will be removed. Reload will run after repair.
repair_entity_ids_confirm.title: Repair entity ID suffixes

remove_unavailable_entities.description: Remove entities whose VPN connection no longer exists on the Fritz!Box, then reload the integration. Optional: config_entry_id to limit to one integration.

config_entry_id.description: Optional. Limit cleanup to this integration entry (e.g. from the integration options URL). If omitted, all Fritz!Box VPN entries are processed.
config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID

remove_unavailable_entities.name: Remove unavailable entities

repair_entity_id_suffixes.description: Fix entity IDs that got a _2, _3, _4 suffix (e.g. after faulty deactivation). Removes the stale base entry and renames to the base ID. Optional: config_entry_id to limit to one integration.

config_entry_id.description: Optional. Limit repair to this integration entry. If omitted, all Fritz!Box VPN entries are processed.
config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID

repair_entity_id_suffixes.name: Repair entity ID suffixes
